summary: Test engineering with master handoff: map test layout and coverage gaps (read-only) then WEA master plans tests and/or harness changes and dispatches implement→verify. Tags: test coverage unit e2e harness flaky handoff master.

nodes.promptTemplate:
Testing task:
${task}

You are a READ-ONLY test cartographer (pi). Prepare facts for the WEA master.

Do:
1. Detect test runner and conventions (jest/vitest/pytest/go test/cargo test, file naming, fixtures).
2. Locate tests related to the task; note gaps (no tests, only e2e, missing edge cases).
3. Identify pure units vs integration boundaries (I/O, network, clock).
4. Note flakiness risks (time, order, shared state).
5. Do NOT write tests yet.

OUTPUT: exactly one JSON object:
{
  "summary": "<testing goal>",
  "files_seen": ["..."],
  "test_runner": "<detected or unknown>",
  "change_surface": ["prod + test files likely"],
  "coverage_gaps": ["..."],
  "subtasks": ["what master should plan"],
  "risks": ["flaky, slow, env deps"],
  "tests_related": ["existing related tests"]
}
